mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_application_ext (application_id, project_id, module_instance_id, application_category, application_batch_no, application_notice_id, application_notice_no, is_limited_project, limit_group, expected_budget, expected_start_date, expected_end_date, dept_recommend_rank, dept_recommend_score, dept_recommend_result, science_recommend_rank, science_recommend_score, science_recommend_result, authority_approval_no, authority_approval_date, authority_result, authority_approved_amount, final_submission_no, final_submission_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{projectId}, #{moduleInstanceId}, #{applicationCategory}, #{applicationBatchNo}, #{applicationNoticeId}, #{applicationNoticeNo}, #{isLimitedProject}, #{limitGroup}, #{expectedBudget}, #{expectedStartDate}, #{expectedEndDate}, #{deptRecommendRank}, #{deptRecommendScore}, #{deptRecommendResult}, #{scienceRecommendRank}, #{scienceRecommendScore}, #{scienceRecommendResult}, #{authorityApprovalNo}, #{authorityApprovalDate}, #{authorityResult}, #{authorityApprovedAmount}, #{finalSubmissionNo}, #{finalSubmissionAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_application_ext SET module_instance_id=#{moduleInstanceId}, application_category=#{applicationCategory}, application_batch_no=#{applicationBatchNo}, application_notice_id=#{applicationNoticeId}, application_notice_no=#{applicationNoticeNo}, is_limited_project=#{isLimitedProject}, limit_group=#{limitGroup}, expected_budget=#{expectedBudget}, expected_start_date=#{expectedStartDate}, expected_end_date=#{expectedEndDate}, dept_recommend_rank=#{deptRecommendRank}, dept_recommend_score=#{deptRecommendScore}, dept_recommend_result=#{deptRecommendResult}, science_recommend_rank=#{scienceRecommendRank}, science_recommend_score=#{scienceRecommendScore}, science_recommend_result=#{scienceRecommendResult}, authority_approval_no=#{authorityApprovalNo}, authority_approval_date=#{authorityApprovalDate}, authority_result=#{authorityResult}, authority_approved_amount=#{authorityApprovedAmount}, final_submission_no=#{finalSubmissionNo}, final_submission_at=#{finalSubmissionAt}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE application_id=#{applicationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_application_detail (application_id, project_id, research_background, research_objective, research_content, innovation_points, technical_route, schedule_plan, budget_description, expected_outcomes, feasibility_analysis, risk_analysis, applicant_commitment, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{projectId}, #{researchBackground}, #{researchObjective}, #{researchContent}, #{innovationPoints}, #{technicalRoute}, #{schedulePlan}, #{budgetDescription}, #{expectedOutcomes}, #{feasibilityAnalysis}, #{riskAnalysis}, #{applicantCommitment}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_application_detail SET research_background=#{researchBackground}, research_objective=#{researchObjective}, research_content=#{researchContent}, innovation_points=#{innovationPoints}, technical_route=#{technicalRoute}, schedule_plan=#{schedulePlan}, budget_description=#{budgetDescription}, expected_outcomes=#{expectedOutcomes}, feasibility_analysis=#{feasibilityAnalysis}, risk_analysis=#{riskAnalysis}, applicant_commitment=#{applicantCommitment}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE application_id=#{applicationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_contract_ext (contract_id, project_id, module_instance_id, contract_source, party_a_name, party_a_contact, party_a_phone, party_b_name, party_b_contact, party_b_phone, authority_review_result, authority_review_date, authority_review_opinion, leader_signed_at, school_sealed_at, authority_sealed_at, effective_date, archive_no, archive_location, archive_copies, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{contractId}, #{projectId}, #{moduleInstanceId}, #{contractSource}, #{partyAName}, #{partyAContact}, #{partyAPhone}, #{partyBName}, #{partyBContact}, #{partyBPhone}, #{authorityReviewResult}, #{authorityReviewDate}, #{authorityReviewOpinion}, #{leaderSignedAt}, #{schoolSealedAt}, #{authoritySealedAt}, #{effectiveDate}, #{archiveNo}, #{archiveLocation}, #{archiveCopies}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_contract_ext SET module_instance_id=#{moduleInstanceId}, contract_source=#{contractSource}, party_a_name=#{partyAName}, party_a_contact=#{partyAContact}, party_a_phone=#{partyAPhone}, party_b_name=#{partyBName}, party_b_contact=#{partyBContact}, party_b_phone=#{partyBPhone}, authority_review_result=#{authorityReviewResult}, authority_review_date=#{authorityReviewDate}, authority_review_opinion=#{authorityReviewOpinion}, leader_signed_at=#{leaderSignedAt}, school_sealed_at=#{schoolSealedAt}, authority_sealed_at=#{authoritySealedAt}, effective_date=#{effectiveDate}, archive_no=#{archiveNo}, archive_location=#{archiveLocation}, archive_copies=#{archiveCopies}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE contract_id=#{contractId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_acceptance_ext (acceptance_id, project_id, module_instance_id, is_school_level_acceptance, acceptance_type, acceptance_batch_no, task_completion_rate, paper_count, patent_count, software_copyright_count, other_achievement_count, science_review_result, authority_review_result, authority_review_date, authority_file_no, expert_final_score, expert_final_result, certificate_no, certificate_issue_date, surplus_amount, surplus_return_required, surplus_return_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{acceptanceId}, #{projectId}, #{moduleInstanceId}, #{isSchoolLevelAcceptance}, #{acceptanceType}, #{acceptanceBatchNo}, #{taskCompletionRate}, #{paperCount}, #{patentCount}, #{softwareCopyrightCount}, #{otherAchievementCount}, #{scienceReviewResult}, #{authorityReviewResult}, #{authorityReviewDate}, #{authorityFileNo}, #{expertFinalScore}, #{expertFinalResult}, #{certificateNo}, #{certificateIssueDate}, #{surplusAmount}, #{surplusReturnRequired}, #{surplusReturnStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_acceptance_ext SET module_instance_id=#{moduleInstanceId}, is_school_level_acceptance=#{isSchoolLevelAcceptance}, acceptance_type=#{acceptanceType}, acceptance_batch_no=#{acceptanceBatchNo}, task_completion_rate=#{taskCompletionRate}, paper_count=#{paperCount}, patent_count=#{patentCount}, software_copyright_count=#{softwareCopyrightCount}, other_achievement_count=#{otherAchievementCount}, science_review_result=#{scienceReviewResult}, authority_review_result=#{authorityReviewResult}, authority_review_date=#{authorityReviewDate}, authority_file_no=#{authorityFileNo}, expert_final_score=#{expertFinalScore}, expert_final_result=#{expertFinalResult}, certificate_no=#{certificateNo}, certificate_issue_date=#{certificateIssueDate}, surplus_amount=#{surplusAmount}, surplus_return_required=#{surplusReturnRequired}, surplus_return_status=#{surplusReturnStatus}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE acceptance_id=#{acceptanceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_application_publicity (application_id, project_id, module_instance_id, state_record_id, publicity_title, publicity_scope, publicity_start_date, publicity_end_date, recommended_rank, recommended_reason, has_objection, objection_content, objection_handling_result, objection_handling_comment, publicity_result, confirmed_by, confirmed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{projectId}, #{moduleInstanceId}, #{stateRecordId}, #{publicityTitle}, #{publicityScope}, #{publicityStartDate}, #{publicityEndDate}, #{recommendedRank}, #{recommendedReason}, #{hasObjection}, #{objectionContent}, #{objectionHandlingResult}, #{objectionHandlingComment}, #{publicityResult}, #{confirmedBy}, #{confirmedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_application_publicity WHERE project_id=#{projectId} ORDER BY publicity_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO acceptance_financial_settlement (acceptance_id, project_id, module_instance_id, state_record_id, approved_amount, received_amount, spent_amount, surplus_amount, execution_rate, settlement_result, finance_operator_id, finance_review_comment, settled_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{acceptanceId}, #{projectId}, #{moduleInstanceId}, #{stateRecordId}, #{approvedAmount}, #{receivedAmount}, #{spentAmount}, #{surplusAmount}, #{executionRate}, #{settlementResult}, #{financeOperatorId}, #{financeReviewComment}, #{settledAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM acceptance_financial_settlement WHERE project_id=#{projectId} ORDER BY settlement_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_achievement (project_id, module_instance_id, acceptance_id, achievement_type, achievement_title, author_list, achievement_level, publish_or_grant_date, proof_material_version_id, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{moduleInstanceId}, #{acceptanceId}, #{achievementType}, #{achievementTitle}, #{authorList}, #{achievementLevel}, #{publishOrGrantDate}, #{proofMaterialVersionId}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_achievement SET module_instance_id=#{moduleInstanceId}, acceptance_id=#{acceptanceId}, achievement_type=#{achievementType}, achievement_title=#{achievementTitle}, author_list=#{authorList}, achievement_level=#{achievementLevel}, publish_or_grant_date=#{publishOrGrantDate}, proof_material_version_id=#{proofMaterialVersionId}, remark=#{remark}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE achievement_id=#{achievementId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_achievement WHERE project_id=#{projectId} ORDER BY achievement_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO surplus_funds_return_record (acceptance_id, project_id, module_instance_id, state_record_id, surplus_amount, return_required, return_account_name, return_account_no, return_bank_name, return_status, returned_amount, returned_at, finance_operator_id, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{acceptanceId}, #{projectId}, #{moduleInstanceId}, #{stateRecordId}, #{surplusAmount}, #{returnRequired}, #{returnAccountName}, #{returnAccountNo}, #{returnBankName}, #{returnStatus}, #{returnedAmount}, #{returnedAt}, #{financeOperatorId}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM surplus_funds_return_record WHERE project_id=#{projectId} ORDER BY return_id
